tlx493d_init.message0:
Initialize 3D magnetic sensor %1
Sensor type %2
I2C address %3
Using %4
tlx493d_init.tooltip: Initialize Infineon TLx493D 3D magnetic sensor via I2C interface

tlx493d_get_temperature.tooltip: Read temperature from TLx493D sensor, returns Celsius

tlx493d_get_magnetic_field.message0: Read magnetic field %2 axis (mT) from 3D magnetic sensor %1
tlx493d_get_magnetic_field.tooltip: Read magnetic field value of specified axis from TLx493D sensor in millitesla (mT)

tlx493d_set_sensitivity.tooltip: Set the sensitivity/range of the TLx493D sensor

tlx493d_set_power_mode.message0: Set 3D magnetic sensor %1 power mode to %2
tlx493d_set_power_mode.tooltip: Set the power mode of the TLx493D sensor

tlx493d_has_valid_data.tooltip: Check if the TLx493D sensor data is valid

tlx493d_software_reset.tooltip: Perform a software reset on the TLx493D sensor
